channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ohtani gives hope to young baseball players in Japan, and the rest of the country, too
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Shin Uebori coaches the Fukagawa Hawks youth baseball team in Tokyo, and he is very aware how Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani touches his players.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter leaves game against Kansas State with apparent shoulder injury
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter left the Buffaloes' 31-28 loss to No. 18 Kansas State late in the second quarter Saturday night after a right shoulder injury on a 14-yard reception. Three other Buffs receivers were injured in the game: speedster Jimmy Horn Jr.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nussmeier throws late TD passes, No. 13 LSU rallies to beat No. 9 Ole Miss 29-26 in overtime
item.description: Garrett Nussmeier threw a tying touchdown pass in the final seconds of regulation and hit Kyren Lacy for a 25-yard scoring strike on No. 13 LSU’s first play of overtime, completing a stunning 29-26 comeback victory over No. 9 Mississippi.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dylan Sampson has 1-yard TD run in OT to lift No. 8 Tennessee past Florida, 23-17
item.description: Dylan Sampson scored his third touchdown of the game on a 1-yard run in overtime to give No. 8 Tennessee a 23-17 victory over Florida on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Al Lesar, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kalen DeBoer reacts after Alabama narrowly avoids second straight SEC upset: 'Proud of these guys'
item.description: Despite entering Saturday's game as the overwhelming favorite, Alabama needed very second on the clock to secure a narrow win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Herschel Walker says Obama 'forgot our fight for right to vote' after scolding Black voters against Harris
item.description: Former NFL icon Herschel Walker lambasted former president Obama after Obama's recent scolding of Black men who aren't supporting vice president Harris.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sharks place rookie Macklin Celebrini on IR with a lower-body injury
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — The San Jose Sharks placed rookie Macklin Celebrini on the injured reserve list on Saturday with a lower-body injury. The move came two days after Celebrini made an impressive debut by recording a goal and an assist in an overtime loss to the St. Louis Blues on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Holding a Super Bowl outside the US is a possibility, NFL Commissioner Goodell says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The NFL's aggressive international growth plan could include holding a Super Bowl outside the United States for the first time, Commissioner Roger Goodell said Saturday. Goodell has shot down the idea in the past, but he told a fan forum in London that it's a possibility.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Zealand takes 2-0 lead over Britain in America’s Cup first-to-seven final
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Emirates Team New Zealand showed why it is the two-time defending America’s Cup champion after jumping out to a 2-0 lead over INEOS Britannia in their first-to-seven-wins final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rising returns, but Utes fall flat against ASU, 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising was back at quarterback, but the Utes offense continued to struggle to score touchdowns in a 27-19 loss at Arizona State Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
